channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Mud on road, 23rd March
item.description:
Fairly thick layer of mud building up where local site has not cleaned the road. If it rains this will be dangerous to motorbikes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp outside no 10 on Walnut Close is fused., 23rd March
item.description:
Pitch black as the street lamp has been out for almost a month now. It is very unsafe here as you can’t see.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walnut Close, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very dark, no streetlight between column n.10 and the one by The Railway (pub), 23rd March
item.description:
Lighting column (& therefore lantern) spacing is wrong, this loc'n also new has housing (old Ski Tyres site) leaving this area VERY dark at night - investigate and install additional column to be compliant with regulations.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73b, New Street, St Paul’s, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple potholes forming mainly in lanes 1 and 2 northbound M5 between jct 12 and 11a.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole about 3 to 4 inches deep., 23rd March
item.description:
Parabola lane Cheltenham. Just up from the exit onto the lane from the flats in the old converted job centre. There are 2 x potholes, one right opposite and the deepest pothole about 10 to 15 metres up the road (when driving away from the court building) No paint around either hole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parabola Lane, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath impassable due to deep mud, even though no recent rain., 23rd March
item.description:
Double gateway near the junction of footpaths AG30 and AG31 between Manor Lane and Granna Lane, Gotherington.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Lane, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes and damage to the road, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple pot holes on Hayden Road approaching Old Gloucester Road, some spanning the entire width of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several large holes in middle of Brookfield Road, at junction with Albermarle Road., 23rd March
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are STILL potholes on this road. Some have been sorted. Others have not. It’s shocking the state of that road., 23rd March
item.description:
By Aldi and all along that stretch
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Beeches Road and Little Herberts Road Charlton Kings, 23rd March
item.description:
I draw to your attention several potholes in Beeches Road. 1. Deep pothole at junction of Beeches Road with Little Herberts Road. 2. Deep pothole almost opposite Vineyards Close 3. Deep pothole further up Beeches Road... These are some of the worst I have encountered in my recent travels in Gloucestershire. Thank you for the recent repairs to potholes in Little Herberts Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road signs left near Park Lane junction, 23rd March
item.description:
There are road signs and sand bags left behind from previous road closures
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: There are several road signs left from previous road closures, 23rd March
item.description:
There are two piles of road signs, sandbags etc left along this section from a road closure last year. We’ve just done a village litter pick and these items are snow the only eyesore remaining!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Left hand filter light is not working, 23rd March
item.description:
Side of town hall , heading left up towards imperial/Montpellier gardens
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Large pothold that has recently got deeper, 23rd March
item.description:
Junction of little Herberts Road and Beeches Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 23rd March
item.description:
2 potholes outside Redruth property in church lane if you can’t find it it’s the crater appeared in the road ! Been here for weeks and reported and apparently been addressed ? There are two holes in the mide Of the road one extremely large
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large trip hazard across the whole of the path caused by a tree root, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside number 7-8 next to the independent living centre in village Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Village Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Traffic lights not working, 23rd March
item.description:
Traffic lights not working on London road next to an alley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 356c, London Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Large expanse of surface missing, 23rd March
item.description:
Condition of the road requires resurfacing or patching at the end of the Cul de sac outside 22 Stancombe View

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole x 3 dinner plates, 23rd March
item.description:
Shallow pot hole down to the original core

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large serving plate size pot hole, 23rd March
item.description:
Outside 17 Stancombe View Was reported in February and nothing’s been done. We’re now in March!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stancombe View, Winchcombe, Winchcombe
Report on FixMyStreet
